sections.strapline: We’re looking forward to speaking with you, and...
sections.subtitle: On the call, we’ll show you how it works, walk you through pricing, and answer every question you have. Please note that your attendance is required.
sections.title: You’re one step closer to a hand-picked hire who clears the backlog and stays for years

steps.content: We’ve sent a confirmation email with all your call details. Please click "Yes" (Google) or "Accept" (Microsoft) to confirm your invite. If something changes and you can’t make it, reply to that email and we’ll give your slot to another business. We only have a few each month.
steps.title: Add the event to your calendar and set a reminder

steps.content: Virtual Coworker is built for teams with more work than hands who want proven talent without the hiring hassle. If you know another owner whose team is stretched thin, send this before this month’s spots fill up. Here’s a ready-to-send message:
steps.copyMessage: Hey, I just booked a free consultation with Virtual Coworker, a staffing agency that hand-picks Philippines-based talent for your exact role. They handle the recruiting, HR and payroll, your new team member works your hours and costs up to 80% less than a local salary, and you don’t pay anything until they start. They’ve matched talent for 400+ businesses over 15 years and only take a few consultations each month. Thought it might be worth a look. Here’s all the info: try.virtualcoworker.com
steps.title: Share Virtual Coworker with another business whose team is drowning in work

steps.content: While you wait for your call, scroll the stories below from businesses that were buried in work not long ago. Owners like Dave, whose new SDR booked 14 qualified meetings in the first quarter, and Richard, whose patient coordinator has stayed on his team for almost a year. That’s the kind of hire we’ll help you find on the call.
steps.title: See what happens when the right hire finally clears the backlog

sections.title: Important! To confirm your call, follow the 3 steps below:
Here’s what businesses say about their Virtual Coworkers...
We look forward to meeting you at our call!
